product.name: Ar3 İplik Aramid Vis
product.categorySourceGroup: Inherent Flame Retardant Aramid Viscose Fr Knit Workwear Fabrics
product.titleDescriptor: 53% Viscose Fr 40% m-Aramid 5% p-Aramid 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant Antistatic Fleece Fabric
product.specLine: 300 g/m², 53% Viscose Fr 40% m-Aramid 5% p-Aramid 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant
descriptions: Antistatic Fleece Knit Fabric 53% Viscose Fr 40% m-Aramid 5% p-Aramid 2% Carbon, inherent flame retardant antistatic fleece knit fabric . Ar3İplik Aramid Vis fabric are mostly used by electrical workers and firefighters.
With fleece stucture it is suitable to use in cold zones.
Ar3İplik Aramid Vis is inherent flame retardant with EN 11612 certification.
Suitable for antistatic applications, certified for EN ISO 1149.
It provides arc flash protection with EN 61482 class 1 (4 kA) certification.
53% Viscose Fr 40% m-Aramid 5% p-Aramid 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant Antistatic Fleece Fabric
300 g/m², 53% Viscose Fr 40% m-Aramid 5% p-Aramid 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant
technicalParameters: Fiber | 53% Viscose Fr (CV FR) 40% m-Aramid (m-AR) 5% p-Aramid (p-AR) 2% Carbon (CF) | EN ISO 2076
Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Flame and Heat Protection | Done | EN ISO 11612
